title: centaurea orumiehensis
intro: Centaurea orumiehensis, also known as Persian cornflower, is a flowering plant species native to the Middle East and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Centaurea orumiehensis include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and treat various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
